privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically provided data explicitly stated in the prompt. The expected account name is 'Redwood Consulting Partners', the industry is 'Consulting', the type is 'Prospect', the phone is '(415) 555-8200', the billing city is 'San Francisco', and the billing state is 'CA'. All required parameters exactly match the task description and are dynamically tested via the export_result.sh script which queries the SuiteCRM MariaDB backend.
